'''zodaraka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:sabaloid|sabaloid]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-d-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sabaloid|sabaloid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zodaraka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zodarithi|zodarithi]] || [[word:zodariji|zodariji]] || [[word:zodarishi|zodarishi]] || [[word:zodariki|zodariki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zodaruthuthu|zodaruthuthu]] || [[word:zodarujuju|zodarujuju]] || [[word:zodarushushu|zodarushushu]] || [[word:zodarukuku|zodarukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zodaruthu|zodaruthu]] || [[word:zodaruju|zodaruju]] || [[word:zodarushu|zodarushu]] || [[word:zodaruku|zodaruku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zodarufthuf|zodarufthuf]] || [[word:zodarufjuf|zodarufjuf]] || [[word:zodarufshuf|zodarufshuf]] || [[word:zodarufkuf|zodarufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zodarethe|zodarethe]] || [[word:zodareje|zodareje]] || [[word:zodareshe|zodareshe]] || [[word:zodareke|zodareke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zodarothotho|zodarothotho]] || [[word:zodarojojo|zodarojojo]] || [[word:zodaroshosho|zodaroshosho]] || [[word:zodarokoko|zodarokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zodarotho|zodarotho]] || [[word:zodarojo|zodarojo]] || [[word:zodarosho|zodarosho]] || [[word:zodaroko|zodaroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zodarofthof|zodarofthof]] || [[word:zodarofjof|zodarofjof]] || [[word:zodarofshof|zodarofshof]] || [[word:zodarofkof|zodarofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zodarÃŸfthÃŸf|zodarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zodarÃŸfjÃŸf|zodarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zodarÃŸfshÃŸf|zodarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zodarÃŸfkÃŸf|zodarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zodarÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|zodarÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zodarÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|zodarÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zodarÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|zodarÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zodarÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|zodarÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zodarÃŸfthÃŸf|zodarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zodarÃŸfjÃŸf|zodarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zodarÃŸfshÃŸf|zodarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zodarÃŸfkÃŸf|zodarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zodarÃŸfthÃŸf|zodarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zodarÃŸfjÃŸf|zodarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zodarÃŸfshÃŸf|zodarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zodarÃŸfkÃŸf|zodarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zodarÃḊthÃḊ|zodarÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:zodarÃḊjÃḊ|zodarÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:zodarÃḊshÃḊ|zodarÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:zodarÃḊkÃḊ|zodarÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zodarathatha|zodarathatha]] || [[word:zodarajaja|zodarajaja]] || [[word:zodarashasha|zodarashasha]] || [[word:zodarakaka|zodarakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zodaratha|zodaratha]] || [[word:zodaraja|zodaraja]] || [[word:zodarasha|zodarasha]] || [[word:zodaraka|zodaraka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zodarafthaf|zodarafthaf]] || [[word:zodarafjaf|zodarafjaf]] || [[word:zodarafshaf|zodarafshaf]] || [[word:zodarafkaf|zodarafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zodarasha|zodarasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zodarshÃḋsha|zodarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zodarosha|zodarosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zodarmusha|zodarmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zodaryasha|zodaryasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozodarnkshÃḋsha|gozodarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozodarnkrosha|gozodarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozodarnkmusha|gozodarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozodarnkyasha|gozodarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zodadarasha|zodadarasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zodadarshÃḋsha|zodadarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zodadarosha|zodadarosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zodadarmusha|zodadarmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zodadaryasha|zodadaryasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozodadarnkshÃḋsha|gozodadarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozodadarnkrosha|gozodadarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozodadarnkmusha|gozodadarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozodadarnkyasha|gozodadarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zedÃḊrasha|zedÃḊrasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zedÃḊrshÃḋsha|zedÃḊrshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zedÃḊrosha|zedÃḊrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zedÃḊrmusha|zedÃḊrmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zedÃḊryasha|zedÃḊryasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozedÃḊrnkshÃḋsha|gozedÃḊrnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozedÃḊrnkrosha|gozedÃḊrnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozedÃḊrnkmusha|gozedÃḊrnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozedÃḊrnkyasha|gozedÃḊrnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zodfarasha|zodfarasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zodfarshÃḋsha|zodfarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zodfarosha|zodfarosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zodfarmusha|zodfarmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zodfaryasha|zodfaryasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozodfarnkshÃḋsha|gozodfarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozodfarnkrosha|gozodfarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozodfarnkmusha|gozodfarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozodfarnkyasha|gozodfarnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
